subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, and through it God guideth whomsoever He willeth. Verily, He is the All-Forgiving, the Most Bountiful, and by it hath the horizon been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و به یهدی الله من یشاء انه لهو الغفور الکریم و به انار افق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @martyrs and martyrdom
